title: HINC-02 Age of Householder—Households by Total Money Income Type of Household Race and Hispanic Origin
topic: household income by age and household type
indicator: household income distribution by family/nonfamily type and age
summary: Provides age and household-type income distributions for family and nonfamily households.
comparability_notes: Money income; not aligned directly with CE consumer units or after-tax resources.

title: Consumer Expenditure Surveys Tables Getting Started Guide
indicator: income expenditure demographic table design and caveats
summary: Defines consumer units reference persons table dimensions and 2024 tax-data limitation.
comparability_notes: 2024 CE lacks after-tax income estimates because TAXSIM was not updated.

title: Consumer Expenditure Survey Demographic Tables 2024
indicator: age composition earners size tenure income
summary: Lists 2024 tables by age composition earners housing tenure and other characteristics.
comparability_notes: Most standard tables are one-dimensional margins; joint archetypes require microdata.

title: Employment Characteristics of Families 2025 Table 2
summary: Reports the prevalence of both spouses employed and other employment combinations.
comparability_notes: Employment status alone does not identify children income housing or financial pooling.

title: Housing Prices Inter-generational Co-residence and Excess Savings by the Young
topic: young adult co-residence housing and saving
indicator: co-residence individual saving and housing prices
summary: Studies housing prices parental co-residence and young adults' saving.
comparability_notes: Working paper; data and institutional period must be retained.

title: 2021年中国家庭金融调查数据公开发布
author_or_institution: 中国家庭金融调查与研究中心
indicator: income expenditure employment housing assets debt social security
summary: Documents CHFS sample coverage and variables required for household archetypes.
comparability_notes: Weights access conditions and cross-wave consistency require formal extraction.

title: Research on the Impact and Heterogeneity of Housing on the Allocation of Financial Assets of Households
summary: Finds different portfolio associations for one-home and multiple-home households.
comparability_notes: Observational and model-based estimates; not a full cash-flow archetype.

title: Chinese Household Saving and Dependent Children Theory and Evidence
indicator: family size demographics and saving rate
summary: Examines how dependent children affect household saving rates.
comparability_notes: Education and child expenditure classifications require attention.

title: Fertility and Savings The Effect of China's Two-Child Policy on Household Savings
population: bank customers linked to administrative records
indicator: income spending births credit and saving
summary: Uses transactions and administrative data around births to assess fertility and saving mechanisms.
comparability_notes: Regional bank sample; external validity to all Chinese households must be evaluated.

title: Households and Families Census 2021
indicator: couple with children couple without children lone parent
summary: Provides family-type population counts and shares.
comparability_notes: Census family type does not itself indicate complete financial pooling or current income.

title: Personal Income in Australia 2022-23
topic: personal income by age and source
indicator: total and employee income by age sex geography and migration status
summary: Provides current personal-income medians sources and downloadable age tables.
comparability_notes: Tax-record income is individual and not equivalent to household disposable income.

title: Family Composition Census Variable
summary: Defines couple no children couple with children lone parent and other family categories.
comparability_notes: Relationship classification must be combined with income employment and tenure variables.

title: Survey of Income and Housing Results Will Not Be Released
topic: income wealth and housing data quality
summary: Explains the absence of the planned current SIH household distribution release.
comparability_notes: Requires combining older SIH HILDA Census and current national accounts.

title: Consumer Expenditures 2024
indicator: income expenditure housing transport and demographics
summary: Provides 2024 overall CE benchmark and links to demographic tables.
comparability_notes: Aggregate mean is not an archetype and 2024 after-tax income is unavailable.
